author: Eric Saiwak
name: QK Gain Init 1.2 + Sliding Window Eval (stride=64)
blurb: Two orthogonal improvements over baseline: (1) QK_GAIN_INIT=1.2 (down from 1.5) for better attention stability during training, and (2) sliding window evaluation with stride=64 giving each token 960+ tokens of context. Training changes are minimal (one hyperparameter); the sliding window is eval-only. Environment: QK_GAIN_INIT=1.2, EVAL_STRIDE=64, EVAL_BATCH_SEQS=32.
